caption: A man with glasses, wearing a silver-grey wig styled in a tall peak, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and suspenders, sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a black microphone. The background is a wall featuring various framed photographs and clothing items, including a garment with a "LEE" label. A recurring logo on the left side of the scene includes the text "PODCAST" and "TALK". Another logo on the right side reads "GOSS TALK JOY" with a small microphone icon. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expression and mouth movements as if speaking. The camera angle and the arrangement of the studio equipment and background elements remain static throughout the clip.
